parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.model, max_tokens: $json.max_tokens, system: $json.systemPrompt, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: $json.userPrompt }] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ action: 'post_revised', post_id: $json.postId, content: $json.content, version_number: $json.versionNumber, feedback: $json.feedback }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ content: $('Code - Extract Revised Content').item.json.content, version_id: $('Supabase - webhook-from-n8n').item.json.action }) }}
